title: Migrating a Jekyll-based site from GitHub Pages
excerpt: title: Migrating a Jekyll-based site from GitHub Pages description: Learn how to migrate a Jekyll-based site from GitHub Pages to Cloudflare Pages. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. In this tutorial, you will learn how to migrate an existing [GitHub Pages site using Jekyll ↗](https://docs.github.com/en/pages/setting-up-a-github-pages-site-with-jekyll/about-github-pages-and-jekyll) to Cloudflare Pages. Jekyll is one of the most popular static site generators used with GitHub Pages, and migrating your GitHub Pages site to Cloudflare Pages will take a few short steps.
